feedItems.description: allocated £10.0m to Environment & Streets (≈£70 per resident)
allocated £5.6m to Council Running Costs (≈£39 per resident)
allocated £3.8m to Culture & Leisure (≈£27 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £115 (5.1%) to £2391
